PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL DATE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAD TO ATTEND GRANDMOTHER'S FUNERAL. ALL PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO RETURN ON TUESDAY, 11/1/05 AT 9:30 AM FOR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO UPDATE THE COURT AS TO THE FUNERAL ARRANGEMENTS. ON 11/1/05, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO RETURN AT EX PARTE CALENDAR IN DEPT. 206 FOR AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME TO HEAR PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL WITH HEARING DATE FOR THURSDAY, 11/3/05 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206.
